description_long: This is a round, two-layer cake with a light blue icing covering the top and sides, adorned with a thick border of bright pink piped frosting along the top and bottom edges. The cake features a wavy white band with a black zigzag pattern encircling the middle, adding a playful decorative touch. Four upright candles in red, green, and yellow hues are evenly spaced on the top, each with a small flame. The top surface also displays geometric white shapes, possibly made from fondant or icing, for added visual interest. The cake sits on a flat, round, orange-brown tray or plate, providing a stable base. The overall appearance is festive and suitable for celebrations, with a cartoonish, stylized finish.
description: A festive, two-layer round cake with blue icing, pink piped frosting, geometric white decorations, and four lit candles, displayed on a round orange-brown tray.
description_view_0: Front view shows all four candles, the geometric white shapes on the blue icing, and the pink piped border most prominently.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the wavy white and black zigzag band around the cake's side and gives a clear view of the candle arrangement.
description_view_2: The geometric white decorations on the top are more visible, and the pink frosting border appears continuous and thick.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side decorations and the distribution of the candles, with the orange-brown tray clearly visible.
